title: Richly Flavored British Ground Beef Casserole
description: A malty and savory weeknight British dish featuring ground beef and pistachios, cooked to perfection in a kazan cauldron. This low-fat friendly casserole is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the shio-cure seasoning, malt vinegar, and dried thyme to the skillet and stir to combine.
In a small bowl, whisk together the flour and low-fat milk until smooth.
Add the flour mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in the ground pistachios and beef broth.
Transfer the mixture to a kazan cauldron or large casserole dish.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the mixture is hot and the top is lightly browned.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
